full_narration: You think the Smurfs are just cute, blue creatures, but their dark history will shock you. They weren't always the friendly, forest-dwelling Smurfs we know today. In fact, their origins are rooted in a 19th-century Belgian cartoon. The Smurfs were created by Peyo, but they were initially depicted as mean-spirited, thieving creatures. It wasn't until the 1950s that they evolved into the lovable Smurfs we adore today.
